rationale: The proposed change concerns a property tax homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). The rule governs educator certificate revocation notices. The two provisions are unrelated and do not interact.
quote: The board shall promptly notify the agency for purposes of Section 22A.151 if the board revokes a certificate or permit of a person on a finding that the person engaged in misconduct described by Section 22A.051(a)(2)(A), (B), (C), or (D).
_note: No relationship between proposed homestead exemption increase and educator misconduct revocation notice statute.
